name: MIR
purpose: In-process micro-JIT backend for the code-generated ODE RHS (GH #78). c2mir (MIR's C11 frontend) JIT-compiles the same C source bngsim._codegen already emits, in ~1-2 ms instead of shelling out to `cc -O3` + dlopen (~80 ms-seconds). Targets x86-64 and aarch64 (Apple Silicon) with no external toolchain — MIR is a single ~1 MB C library, so it adds no new build dependency to the C++/scikit-build wheel pipeline.

notes: mir.c #includes the matching target backend (mir-x86_64.c / mir-aarch64.c / ...) and mir-interp.c, guarded by target macros; only the host target's file is read.
c2mir/c2mir.c #includes the per-arch frontend under c2mir/<target>/, also target-guarded.
All target backends are vendored so the same tree builds on x86-64 and aarch64 without per-arch pruning.

included_paths: mir.c, mir.h, mir-gen.c, mir-gen.h, mir-interp.c and all root mir-*.{c,h} backends
mir-alloc*.{c,h}, mir-code-alloc*.{c,h}, mir-dlist.h, mir-htab.h, mir-varr.h, mir-bitmap.h, mir-hash.h, mir-reduce.h, real-time.h
c2mir/ (c2mir.c, c2mir.h, mirc*.h, and the x86_64/aarch64/ppc64/s390x/riscv64 frontend subdirs)
excluded_paths: .github, adt-tests, c-benchmarks, c-tests, llvm2mir, mir2c, mir-tests, mir-utils
sieve.c, mir-bin-driver.c, mir-bin-run.c, mir-gen-stub.c, c2mir/c2mir-driver.c (standalone CLI/test drivers)
*.svg, GNUmakefile, CMakeLists.txt (upstream's), docs (*.md except LICENSE/README), shell + CI scripts

guardrails.jit_source_must_be_header_free: c2mir's bundled preprocessor cannot parse the platform SDK <math.h>/<stdlib.h> (they use compiler-specific extensions; on macOS it reports 'Unsupported compiler detected'). The JIT path therefore strips system #includes from the generated C and prepends extern declarations for the libc/libm symbols it calls (pow, exp, sqrt, log, fabs, fmax, fmin, memset, ...). MIR resolves those externals at link time via the import resolver (dlsym(RTLD_DEFAULT, name)). See bngsim/include/bngsim/mir_jit.hpp.
guardrails.api_find_func_by_iteration: MIR_get_global_item is declared in mir.h but not defined in this commit; locate the JIT'd function by scanning module->items for a MIR_func_item whose name matches (the version-stable approach c2mir-driver uses).
guardrails.single_maintainer_upstream: MIR is effectively single-maintainer. Pinned to an immutable commit; refresh deliberately.

notes: Prototype vendoring for GH #78. Gated behind the BNGSIM_ENABLE_MIR CMake option (default OFF); the cc-subprocess + dlopen codegen backend and the ExprTk fallback are unchanged when MIR is off.

Refresh via bngsim/scripts/vendor_mir.py (prunes the tree from a vnmakarov/mir checkout and re-anchors this file's commit + files{} checksums); --check is the offline tripwire that the checked-in tree still matches this metadata. See bngsim/scripts/MIR_VENDORING.md.
